description:
## Emby Patches

Patch bundle for ReVanced Manager.

### Spoof server host
Replaces the Emby server validation host with a custom one to bypass premiere checks.

### Usage
1. Import this `.rvp` file in ReVanced Manager (Patches → ✏️ → + → Select from storage)
2. Select the Emby app (com.mb.android)
3. Enable "Spoof server host"
4. Patch
